FI-002_onSave.code_preview: Reads servers from api.getMcpServers(), merges entry, writes via api.setMcpServers(), calls SDK add, refetches queries, then clears editingEntry. All correct.
FI-002_onSave.risk: None — architect should REMOVE this from scope
FI-002_onSave.recommendation: EXCLUDE from architect plan. Do not touch.

MCP-006_addMutation.code_preview: addMutation.mutationFn only calls sdk.client.mcp.add(). onSuccess only resets form and refetches — never writes to electron-store via api.setMcpServers(). Server is lost on restart.
MCP-006_addMutation.risk: P0 data loss — servers added via UI dialog disappear after app restart
MCP-006_addMutation.recommendation: ADD to plan. Fix onSuccess: read servers from store, append new entry, write back via api.setMcpServers(), THEN refetch. Match exactly the onSave pattern at line 380.
MCP-006_addMutation.delta_code:
In addMutation.onSuccess BEFORE queryClient.refetchQueries:
  const api = (window as any).api
  const existing = (await api?.getMcpServers?.()) ?? []
  existing.push({ name: input.name, config: { type: 'remote', url: input.url, enabled: true } })
  await api?.setMcpServers?.(existing)

MCP-007_nested_dialog.code_preview: DialogEditMcp uses useDialog() from Kobalte context (line 16). handleSave calls dialog.close() at line 63. Cancel button calls dialog.close() at line 155. The inner Dialog wrapper at line 65 is nested inside the parent Dialog from dialog-select-mcp.tsx, creating competing Kobalte portal contexts.
MCP-007_nested_dialog.risk: P0 wrong dialog close — closing edit may close entire MCP management dialog
MCP-007_nested_dialog.recommendation: ADD to plan. Minimal fix: remove useDialog() and <Dialog> wrapper from DialogEditMcp. Render form as styled panel. Parent controls visibility via editingEntry signal. No need for separate portal or drawer.
MCP-007_nested_dialog.minimal_fix:
1. Remove 'import { useDialog } from "@opencode-ai/ui/context/dialog"'
2. Remove 'const dialog = useDialog()'
3. Remove 'dialog.close()' from handleSave (line 63) and cancel button (line 155)
4. Replace <Dialog> wrapper with <div class="flex flex-col gap-5 p-6 pt-0 border-t border-border-weak-base">
5. Add title rendering as plain heading instead of Dialog title prop

MCP-002_handleEdit_reconciliation.code_preview: handleEdit reads from electron-store only. If server exists in sync.data.mcp but not in electron-store, setEditingEntry is never called — edit silently fails.
MCP-002_handleEdit_reconciliation.risk: P1 silent UX failure — user clicks Edit, nothing happens, no error shown
MCP-002_handleEdit_reconciliation.recommendation: ADD to plan. Add fallback: when servers.find returns undefined, check sync.data.mcp[name] and construct default McpServerEntry.

dual_SOT_overlap_with_lane1.lane1_scope: Write queue per store namespace + version counter + async IPC + dual SOT reconciliation
dual_SOT_overlap_with_lane1.recommendation: Lane 1 handles IPC-level reconciliation (write queue, version counter). Lane 2 handles UI-level reconciliation (handleEdit fallback). No conflict if scoped correctly. Lane 2 should NOT touch ipc.ts — use produce_fragment if needed. Lane 2 should NOT implement version counter or write queue.

toggle_mutation_error.code_preview: toggle useMutation has onSuccess but NO onError handler. If connect/disconnect fails, error is swallowed.
toggle_mutation_error.recommendation: OPTIONAL ADD: Add onError handler with console.warn or toast. Low priority vs P0 bugs above.

delete_refetch_MCP-003.code_preview: confirmRemove correctly: disconnects SDK, removes auth, filters from store, writes back, refetches queries. All correct.
delete_refetch_MCP-003.recommendation: EXCLUDE from architect plan. Already functional.

coupling.note: The arch prefab targets dialog-select-mcp.tsx and dialog-edit-mcp.tsx — both in the same component layer. The reconciliation fix (handleEdit) would add a dependency on sync.data.mcp for fallback construction, which is already consumed for list rendering (line 108). No new conceptual coupling. However, the 'unified data source' scope in the prefab is too broad — it implies changes to both store layers (ipc.ts and electron-store), which would spread across packages/app and packages/desktop. Narrow to handleEdit fallback only.

debuggability.note: handleEdit (line 64-71) silently fails when server not found in electron-store — only 'console.warn' that doesn't reach user. addMutation fails silently on SDK add error (onError shows in addForm.error, which IS visible). But addMutation success shows no toast. toggle mutation has no onError — silent failure. OnSave (line 380) catches errors with console.warn only — no user-visible feedback. The edit flow produces no success or failure confirmation beyond the dialog closing. The plan must ensure ALL error paths surface visible feedback to the user.
red_flags: handleEdit line 64-71: silent failure when server not in electron-store — no UI state change, no user-visible error
toggle mutation line 112: no onError handler — connect/disconnect failures are swallowed
onSave line 380-396: try/catch with console.warn only — disk write failures are invisible to user

convergence.note: The onSave fix (FI-002) is already done — re-fixing would be a regression. The arch prefab is directionally correct for MCP-006 and MCP-007, but it doesn't mention them by name. The fix for addMutation.onSuccess should follow the EXACT pattern of onSave at line 380 — this is good convergence because it creates a consistent pattern across the same file. The dual SOT reconciliation scoped to handleEdit is tight and targeted. However, 'unified data source' in the prefab suggests a broader architectural change that would overlap with Lane 1's IPC reconciliation scope — this must be avoided.
red_flags: Prefab says 'Fix onSave' but it's already fixed — must be excluded
Prefab says 'unified data source' — too broad, overlaps with Lane 1 IPC work
Prefab omits addMutation persist (MCP-006) — the most critical unfixed bug

surface_area.note: No exports or public APIs are touched. dialog-edit-mcp.tsx exports DialogEditMcp which is consumed only by dialog-select-mcp.tsx. No type changes to McpServerEntry or McpRemoteConfig. Plan impacts 2 components in the same package (packages/app). Low surface area.

testability.note: SolidJS component logic embedded in JSX makes isolated testing difficult. addMutation and handleEdit are closures inside the component — they can't be unit-tested in isolation. Electron-store IPC (api.getMcpServers / api.setMcpServers) requires a running Electron main process or mocking. SDK (sdk.client.mcp) also requires mocking. A 10-line bun -e script test would require mock stubs for (window as any).api and useSDK(). Plan should at minimum produce a test pattern that verifies the addMutation.onSuccess data flow.
red_flags: addMutation, handleEdit, onSave are closures inside DialogSelectMcp — extraction needed for testability
SDK mcp methods require sdk mock

error_clarity.note: Current state: edit failures → console.warn (invisible to user). addMutation SDK errors → visible in addForm.error (good). Delete errors → console.warn (invisible). Toggle errors → completely silent (worst). The plan must add user-visible toast/error messages for all CRUD operations. The onSave handler at line 380 is the pattern to follow — it at least catches errors even if it doesn't show them to the user. Add showToast calls for failures.
red_flags: All error paths in CRUD flow rely on console.warn — zero user visibility
handleEdit line 64-71: when entry not found, silently returns — user sees no feedback that edit couldn't load

reversibility.note: Three recommended fixes (MCP-006 addMutation, MCP-007 nested dialog, handleEdit reconciliation) touch 2 files: dialog-select-mcp.tsx and dialog-edit-mcp.tsx. Each fix is in a distinct section of the code (addMutation ~line 129, handleEdit ~line 64, dialog-nesting ~line 380+ or dialog-edit-mcp.tsx). They can be applied and reverted independently. No shared state mutation between them. Good reversibility.

must_fix.description: addMutation.onSuccess does not persist to electron-store
must_fix.fix: Add api.setMcpServers() call in addMutation.onSuccess before refetch. Read existing servers, append new McpServerEntry, write back. Match onSave pattern at lines 380-390 exactly.

must_fix.description: Nested Kobalte dialog in DialogEditMcp causes outer dialog close
must_fix.fix: Remove useDialog() and <Dialog> wrapper. Render as styled panel div. Parent controls visibility via editingEntry signal.

must_fix.description: handleEdit falls back to sync.data.mcp when server not in electron-store
must_fix.fix: Add fallback in handleEdit to construct McpServerEntry from sync.data.mcp[name] data when electron-store lookup fails.

must_exclude.reason: Already fixed at dialog-select-mcp.tsx:380-396. Do not touch.
Overlaps with Lane 1 IPC Reliability scope. Lane 2 should only add handleEdit fallback, not full store unification.
Already works correctly at dialog-select-mcp.tsx:77-101. No changes needed.

optional_deferrable.reason: Not critical. DialogEditMcp already handles both local and remote types. Add transport validation as separate follow-up.
Add onError handler to toggle mutation for silent failure prevention. Minor UX improvement.

objections.finding: Plan prefab says 'Fix edit onSave' but FI-002 onSave is already fixed at dialog-select-mcp.tsx:380-396. Fixing again would regress or duplicate.
objections.repair: Remove onSave fix from scope. All hands off lines 380-396.

objections.finding: Plan prefab completely omits MCP-006 (addMutation doesn't persist to electron-store). This is the #1 broken feature — servers added via UI are lost on restart. Cartographer flagged it as SG-1 (P0 data loss).
objections.repair: Add MCP-006 fix as P0 must-fix. Add api.setMcpServers() in addMutation.onSuccess.

objections.finding: Plan prefab omits MCP-007 (nested dialog portal). Stress testing flagged it as F-032, cartographer flagged it as SG-2. The nested Dialog-within-Dialog architecture creates competing portal layers — dialog.close() may close the outer dialog.
objections.repair: Add MCP-007 fix as P0 must-fix. Remove useDialog() and <Dialog> wrapper from DialogEditMcp.

objections.finding: Plan prefab says 'unified data source' which implies broad IPC reconciliation overlapping with Lane 1. Lane 1 already plans write queue + version counter + dual SOT reconciliation at the IPC layer. Lane 2 should only add handleEdit fallback as a targeted UI fix.
objections.repair: Narrow 'unified data source' to: add sync.data.mcp fallback in handleEdit when electron-store lookup fails. Do not touch ipc.ts. Do not implement store unification.

objections.finding: All CRUD error paths use console.warn only — no user-visible feedback. handleEdit (line 64-71) silently fails if server not in store. toggle mutation (line 112) has no onError handler. Errors must be surfaced.
objections.repair: Add showToast or equivalent user-visible error messages to all CRUD error paths. Add onError to toggle mutation. On the addMutation onSuccess fix, extend the onError pattern — it already has good onError handling at line 144-146.

objections.finding: addMutation.onSuccess has no await on setStore calls — batch updates to SolidJS store may not flush before mode switch triggers re-render. The form reset at line 141 is fire-and-forget.
objections.repair: Add await before setStore calls if they're async, or wrap in batch(). SolidJS createStore calls are sync, but the mode switch + form reset should be in the same render cycle.

conditions_for_approval: Plan must EXCLUDE FI-002 (onSave fix — already done at line 380)
Plan must INCLUDE MCP-006 (addMutation persist to electron-store) as P0
Plan must INCLUDE MCP-007 (nested dialog fix) as P0
Plan must INCLUDE handleEdit fallback reconciliation as P1 (not full 'unified data source')
Plan must EXCLUDE ipc.ts changes — defer to Lane 1
Plan must add user-visible error messages (showToast) to all CRUD error paths
Plan must follow onSave line 380 pattern for addMutation.onSuccess fix

follow_up_issues_to_file.description: addMutation only supports remote MCP servers (McpRemoteConfig). No UI path to add local servers with command+args. DialogEditMcp supports both types but the add form only produces remote entries. Integrate add and edit flows or extend add form.
Toggle mutation (line 112) has no onError handler — connect/disconnect failures are completely silent. Add onError with user-visible error message.
No URL validation in dialog-edit-mcp — arbitrary protocol/dangerous values accepted. Stress finding F-040. Add URL scheme validation.
IPC set-desktop-mcp-servers handler has no try/catch — disk errors become unhandled promise rejections (stress finding F-005). Add try/catch in ipc.ts. Deferred to Lane 1 or separate fix.
